claims.claim_text: Pillow is used by runtime code but not declared in pyproject.toml
claims.observed_result: Pillow 12.2.0 is importable (import PIL) but pyproject.toml contains no Pillow/PIL dependency.
claims.owner_notes: Route C171 in injectors uses PIL. Add Pillow to [project.dependencies].

claims.claim_text: README.md references stale template path templates/template.pptx instead of templates/bami/template.pptx
claims.observed_result: Two matches: line 13 and line 78 reference 'templates/template.pptx'.
claims.owner_notes: Update to templates/bami/template.pptx or the correct brand-parameterized path.

claims.claim_text: selection_warnings returned by build_deck() are not surfaced by the CLI
claims.observed_result: No matches. build_deck() returns selection_warnings but CLI discards them.
claims.owner_notes: Print selection_warnings to stderr. Optionally add --strict-selection flag.

claims.claim_text: Explicit slide_spec.layout goes directly to expand_layout() and bypasses family/variant/registry/native injector resolution
claims.observed_result: When layout_name is truthy, blocks = expand_layout(...) + blocks. No resolve_pattern() call.
claims.owner_notes: Route explicit layout through same manifest/registry path; treat layout as explicit semantic hint, not renderer bypass.

claims.claim_text: Explicit blocks[].kind == 'inject-pattern' bypasses semantic selection, contract validation, registry validation
claims.observed_result: Explicit blocks are concatenated after layout/content resolution. No validation of inject-pattern canonical_id.
claims.owner_notes: Validate inject-pattern blocks against registry before rendering; fail with BuildError for unknown canonical_id.

claims.claim_text: hint_category acts as Phase 0 short-circuit that skips structural matching, capacity checks, fallback policy, and contract validation
claims.observed_result: If hint_category matches an alias, _build_result() is called immediately with no structural matching, capacity check, or fallback.
claims.owner_notes: Make hint_category structurally validated. Add content-key matching before accepting hint. Preserve warn-only mode for legacy compatibility if needed.

claims.claim_text: Default graphical variant resolution is first enabled YAML order, not an explicit default or scored selection policy
claims.observed_result: When no explicit graphical_variant is requested, resolve_variant() returns first enabled variant in YAML declaration order. No scoring, no family-level default.
claims.owner_notes: Add family-level default_graphical_variant. Implement scored selection with content-based heuristics.

claims.claim_text: Funnel diagram contract requires 'segments', while manifest accepts 'stages', 'steps', or 'items', and injectors accept either 'segments' or 'stages' depending on variant
claims.reproduction_command: Read contract, manifest entry, and _content_to_injector_params() for funnel
claims.observed_result: Contract requires 'segments'. Manifest accepts 'stages', 'steps', 'items'. inject_funnel_diagram reads 'segments'. inject_funnel_conversion reads 'stages'. _content_to_injector_params maps items→segments for 'funnel-diagram' and items→stages for 'funnel-conversion'. No normalized funnel content model exists.
claims.owner_notes: Pass 2 content normalization must map all aliases to canonical funnel content. Pass 3 fixes visual output.

claims.claim_text: funnel-diagram/sales-growth claims supports_body_text: true but the bound injector (funnel-diagram/inject_funnel_diagram) ignores body text
claims.observed_result: inject_funnel_diagram draws label + value per segment. No body text rendering path exists. Description says 'optional body text on each stage' but the injector draws no body text.
claims.owner_notes: Either implement body text rendering in funnel injector or set supports_body_text: false in registry.

claims.claim_text: conversion-pipeline description promises flow arrows, but the injector is horizontal stacked bars without arrows
claims.observed_result: inject_funnel_conversion draws horizontal rounded-rectangle bars with labels. No flow arrows/connectors between stages. Description says 'flow arrows between them'.
claims.owner_notes: Either add flow arrows between conversion stages or update registry description.

claims.claim_text: radial-cycle is 'planned' and, if explicitly requested, routes to an injector that draws nodes without arcs/connectors
claims.observed_result: inject_circular_process_loop (injector_id: circular-process-loop) draws circles only — no arcs/connectors between nodes. Radial-cycle is 'planned' but routes to same injector. The circle-steps injector HAS connectors (thin rectangles).
claims.owner_notes: If radial-cycle remains 'planned', it must be rejected by strict variant selection. The injector needs arcs or radial-cycle must use the circle-steps injector ID.

claims.claim_text: Requesting a planned variant (radial-cycle) via graphical_variant currently falls back silently with warning
claims.observed_result: When variant_entry.status != 'enabled', code falls back to first enabled variant with a warning. This is the planned-vs-requested behavior.
claims.owner_notes: Scored selection in Pass 2 should handle planned status explicitly.

claims.claim_text: folded-arrow-horizontal renders numbered circles with RIGHT_ARROW connectors, not a continuous folded ribbon
claims.observed_result: The injector draws OVAL shapes + RIGHT_ARROW connectors + text labels. Description says 'folded arrow with numbered circles'. It is circles+arrows, not a folded chevron ribbon.
claims.owner_notes: Either rename to honest description ('circle-and-arrow') or implement true folded ribbon grammar.

claims.claim_text: maturity-model-ladder and case-study-card are registry/injector-enabled but appear unreachable through the resolver because the manifest has no entries for those families
claims.observed_result: No matches. Both families have registry entries (status: enabled), injectors, and contracts but the manifest has no entry that can resolve them.
claims.owner_notes: Either add manifest entries with structural matching rules, or downgrade registry status to 'planned'.

claims.claim_text: customer-journey-map-infographic_027d8a is indexed under funnel-diagram but may be semantically closer to a journey/roadmap pattern
claims.observed_result: canonical_category: funnel-diagram. Filename contains 'Customer_Journey_Map'. No registry provenance link. selectable: false. This asset appears misclassified as funnel-diagram when it is a customer journey map.
claims.owner_notes: Reclassify to reference-only (infographic or new customer-journey-map category). Remove runtime-linking from funnel-diagram.

claims.claim_text: _qa classification files exist; their authority (generated vs manual) must be established
claims.observed_result: Directory contains: classification-review.md, coverage.md, duplicates.json, input-classification.csv, input-taxonomy-map.json, input-variant-groups.json, manifest.json, manual-reclassification-2026-07-04.md, qa-report.md, svg-input-migration-2026-07-15.md. svg-variant-index.yaml header says 'Generated from _qa artifacts'.
claims.owner_notes: These appear to be Envato asset pipeline artifacts. svg-variant-index.yaml is the generated index. Do not edit _qa files directly without understanding the generation tooling.

claims.claim_text: Enabled registry families lack validated contract paths: funnel-diagram contract requires 'segments' but content provides 'stages'/'items'
claims.observed_result: Contract requires 'segments' (array of {label, value}), minItems 2, no additionalProperties. But _content_to_injector_params maps items→segments for funnel-diagram and items→stages for funnel-conversion. Contract validation would fail on standard deck content.
claims.owner_notes: Normalize funnel content before contract validation. See C008.

claims.claim_text: Current test suite, build, and validate status is known at HEAD 8e6c736
claims.reproduction_command: python -m pytest -q && python -m tools.pptx_gen --schema clients/_sample/deck.json --out .pi/temp/pass1-sample.pptx --brand bami && python -m tools.pptx_validate .pi/temp/pass1-sample.pptx --brand bami
claims.observed_result: 431 passed, 0 failed, 5 xfailed. Build: 5 slides. Validate: OK.
claims.owner_notes: Baseline complete.

claims.claim_text: circular-process-loop/circle-steps is the only enabled circular variant with confirmed loop closure
claims.observed_result: circle-steps injector draws connector lines between nodes in a closed loop ((idx+1) % n). The radial-cycle (planned) injector draws circles only — no connectors.
claims.owner_notes: Confirmed: circle-steps has loop closure. radial-cycle remains planned and should not render by default.
